leader_proposals.pattern_description: Sustained pattern of unilateral, reactive military decisions without exit strategy or congressional constraint. Trump burned 14 years of missile inventory in 30 days, destroys Iranian mine-laying ships unilaterally, approaches 60-day War Powers deadline without clear exit strategy, and Senate rejects war powers constraints—all within one month.

evidence_chain.headline: Trump Approaches 60-Day War Powers Deadline Without Clear Iran Exit Strategy
evidence_chain.relevance: Direct evidence of reactive, poorly-deliberated military escalation without strategic endpoint

evidence_chain.headline: US Burned 14 Years of Missiles in 30 Days
evidence_chain.relevance: Demonstrates unsustainable munitions expenditure pattern indicating impulsive escalation

evidence_chain.headline: Radio Farda reports US destroys 16 Iranian mine-laying ships in Strait of Hormuz following Trump warnings
evidence_chain.relevance: Unilateral military action following threats without diplomatic deliberation

evidence_chain.headline: Senate Rejects War Powers Resolution to Constrain Trump on Iran by 53-47 Vote
evidence_chain.relevance: Congressional inability to constrain Trump's unilateral war powers despite bipartisan opposition attempts

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: Score already at 90; pattern sustains current assessment but does not justify increase. Congressional rejection of war powers constraints actually reduces accountability barriers, supporting high impulsivity score rather than proposing change.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Systematic dismantling of accountability mechanisms through Senate war powers rejection, congressional inability to constrain escalation, and approval rating collapse (35-39%) without policy change. Trump's 60-day War Powers deadline approaches without exit strategy while bipartisan war powers resolutions fail—demonstrating deliberate institutional bypass.

evidence_chain.headline: Trump's approval rating hits new low at 35-39% as Iran war opposition reaches 59%, bipartisan war powers resolutions fail in Congress
evidence_chain.relevance: Bipartisan war powers resolutions fail despite 59% public opposition, demonstrating Trump's systematic dismantling of accountability mechanisms

evidence_chain.headline: Trump Approaches 60-Day War Powers Deadline Without Clear Iran Exit Strategy
evidence_chain.relevance: Trump ignores War Powers Act deadline without accountability consequences; demonstrates institutional bypass

evidence_chain.headline: Senate Rejects War Powers Resolution to Constrain Trump on Iran by 53-47 Vote
evidence_chain.relevance: Senate rejects its own constitutional constraint mechanism, evidence of Trump's successful dismantling of accountability architecture

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: None substantive; pattern shows systematic institutional bypass across multiple accountability mechanisms. Score already at 88, so proposal for +2 is incremental but justified by evidence of deliberate mechanism dismantling.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Sustained pattern of reactive, unilateral military decisions: Pakistan emerges unexpectedly as Iran-US mediator while simultaneously escalating Pakistan-Afghanistan border conflict with civilian casualties and outpost destructions. Pakistan confirms 'obstacles' to mediation despite continued diplomatic push, suggesting contradictory reactive posture.

evidence_chain.headline: India sidelined as Pakistan emerges as key Iran war mediator
evidence_chain.relevance: Sudden emergence in mediation role without strategic consistency suggests reactive rather than deliberate policy shift

evidence_chain.headline: Pakistan confirms 'obstacles' in Iran-US mediation despite continued diplomatic push
evidence_chain.relevance: Contradictory signals (continued push despite obstacles) indicates reactive rather than strategically deliberate mediation approach

evidence_chain.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan conflict escalates with border outpost destructions and civilian casualties
evidence_chain.relevance: Simultaneous escalation of unrelated conflict demonstrates impulsive military decision-making without strategic coordination

evidence_chain.headline: US Intelligence Community formally groups Pakistan with Iran and North Korea as direct threat to global stability under Asim Munir
evidence_chain.relevance: Elevation to threat-group status reflects consequences of impulsive military escalation and contradictory signaling

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: Pakistan's mediation role shows diplomatic engagement capacity, but contradictory signals (obstacles + continued push) and simultaneous Pakistan-Afghanistan escalation suggest impulsive rather than deliberate strategy.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Intensified survival-focused decision-making: Mojtaba announces Strait of Hormuz blockade as permanent regime survival strategy, demands $800 million monthly toll system, and issues first written message amid health questions. All decisions prioritize regime physical/political preservation over negotiation.

evidence_chain.headline: Iran's IRGC announces Tehran will leverage Strait of Hormuz closure to ensure regime survival, signals permanent blockade strategy
evidence_chain.relevance: Explicitly frames Strait control as regime survival mechanism rather than tactical objective

evidence_chain.headline: Iran demands sovereignty recognition over Strait of Hormuz, proposes $800 million monthly toll system
evidence_chain.relevance: Economic control of choke point framed as survival resource extraction, not negotiable asset

evidence_chain.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei Issues First Written Message as Supreme Leader Amid Questions Over Health
evidence_chain.relevance: Health concerns trigger survival-driven message to assert leadership continuity and regime stability

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: None substantive; all three items demonstrate explicit survival prioritization. Pattern is sustained across 3+ items and multiple source blocs.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Escalating pattern of reactive infrastructure attacks without strategic coordination: Iran strikes Oracle data center in Dubai targeting US tech infrastructure in retaliation for cyber operations, while simultaneously implementing permanent Strait blockade. Actions demonstrate reactive rather than deliberated strategic escalation.

evidence_chain.headline: Iran strikes Oracle data center in Dubai, targets US tech infrastructure in retaliation for cyber operations
evidence_chain.relevance: Reactive strike against third-party infrastructure in response to US cyber operations demonstrates impulsive retaliation pattern

evidence_chain.headline: Iran's IRGC announces Tehran will leverage Strait of Hormuz closure to ensure regime survival, signals permanent blockade strategy
evidence_chain.relevance: Permanent blockade announcement suggests reactive escalation lock-in without exit strategy deliberation

evidence_chain.headline: Iran demands sovereignty recognition over Strait of Hormuz, proposes $800 million monthly toll system
evidence_chain.relevance: Unilateral toll demand demonstrates reactive economic coercion without diplomatic groundwork

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: Three items meet threshold minimum, but confidence is medium-only due to Pravda EU source reliability questions (regional bloc attribution). Oracle strike is reactive, but permanent blockade strategy shows deliberate calculation. Pattern supports modest increase but falls short of high-confidence threshold.

leader_proposals.pattern_description: Sustained pattern of survival-driven strategic positioning: Xi observes Iran war implications for Taiwan strategy, secretly expands nuclear weapons facilities in response to US escalation pattern, purchases 90% of Iran oil exports for strategic leverage, and invites Taiwan opposition leader to visit China—all prioritize regime survival through diversified strategic hedging.

evidence_chain.headline: Xi Jinping's Taiwan strategy shaped by Iran war observations, analysts warn
evidence_chain.relevance: Xi explicitly using US-Iran war as survival lesson for Taiwan contingency planning

evidence_chain.headline: China secretly expands nuclear weapons facilities in Sichuan after village evictions, CNN investigation reveals major escalation
evidence_chain.relevance: Secret nuclear expansion demonstrates survival-driven deterrent buildup in response to US escalation pattern

evidence_chain.headline: China purchases 90% of Iran's oil exports as COSCO suspends Middle East operations
evidence_chain.relevance: Strategic oil purchase provides sanctions-resilience for regime survival while reducing Middle East exposure

evidence_chain.headline: Taiwan Opposition Leader Accepts Xi Jinping's Invitation to Visit China
evidence_chain.relevance: Outreach to Taiwan opposition demonstrates survival-focused political penetration strategy

leader_proposals.counter_evidence: None substantive; all four items demonstrate explicit survival prioritization through strategic hedging and deterrent positioning.

variable_proposals.current_assessment: NPT system facing structural uncertainty as 2026 review conference approaches; nuclear expansion accelerating among major powers without constraint mechanisms
variable_proposals.rationale: Arms Control Association formally warns NPT system faces uncertain future amid nuclear expansion. Xi secretly expands Sichuan nuclear facilities, China increases defense budget 7% despite economic slowdown, and no credible institutional constraint mechanisms are functioning. This represents sustained institutional degradation across review period.

evidence_chain.headline: Arms Control Association warns NPT system faces uncertain future as 2026 review conference approaches amid nuclear expansion
evidence_chain.relevance: Formal institutional assessment of NPT system uncertainty and failure to constrain expansion

evidence_chain.headline: China secretly expands nuclear weapons facilities in Sichuan after village evictions, CNN investigation reveals major escalation
evidence_chain.relevance: Major power nuclear expansion without NPT constraint response demonstrates institutional failure

evidence_chain.headline: China Increases Defense Budget 7% to $278 Billion Despite Slowing Economic Growth
evidence_chain.relevance: Sustained weapons expansion despite economic constraint signals abandonment of arms control norms

variable_proposals.current_assessment: Strait of Hormuz increasingly unstable: Iran signals permanent blockade strategy with $800 million monthly toll demand; US destroyed 16 Iranian mine-laying ships; Trump administration shows no clear exit strategy
variable_proposals.rationale: Iran announces permanent Strait blockade as regime survival strategy and demands $800 million monthly toll system, while US destroys Iranian mine-laying ships and approaches 60-day War Powers deadline without exit strategy. This represents sustained escalation toward Strait closure rather than reopening.

evidence_chain.headline: Iran's IRGC announces Tehran will leverage Strait of Hormuz closure to ensure regime survival, signals permanent blockade strategy
evidence_chain.relevance: Iran explicitly adopts permanent Strait blockade as survival strategy, not tactical option

evidence_chain.headline: Iran demands sovereignty recognition over Strait of Hormuz, proposes $800 million monthly toll system

evidence_chain.headline: World anxious to open Hormuz Strait while Trump and Iran trade threats

evidence_chain.headline: Radio Farda reports US destroys 16 Iranian mine-laying ships in Strait of Hormuz following Trump warnings
evidence_chain.relevance: US destruction of Iranian naval assets demonstrates escalatory commitment to Strait operations

variable_proposals.current_assessment: Pakistan emerges as Iran-US mediator but reports 'obstacles' and contradictory signaling; China-Pakistan propose ceasefire plan; Russia provides intelligence support while positioning as mediator—all channels weakened by escalation
variable_proposals.rationale: Pakistan confirms 'obstacles' in Iran-US mediation despite continued diplomatic push, suggesting channel weakening. China-Pakistan ceasefire proposal has not arrested escalation. Russia provides intelligence to Iran while claiming mediator role. NATO Secretary Rutte faces criticism for 'silence.' Sustained pattern shows diplomatic channels are simultaneously active and ineffective.

evidence_chain.headline: Pakistan confirms 'obstacles' in Iran-US mediation despite continued diplomatic push
evidence_chain.relevance: Pakistan acknowledges mediation channel dysfunction while claiming continued engagement

evidence_chain.headline: Putin provides intelligence support for Iran strikes while positioning as mediator
evidence_chain.relevance: Russia's dual role (supporting Iran while mediating) undermines diplomatic channel credibility

evidence_chain.headline: NATO Secretary General Rutte faces European criticism over 'silence' on US-Iran war
evidence_chain.relevance: NATO institutional silence indicates diplomatic channel breakdown at alliance level

evidence_chain.headline: China and Pakistan jointly propose Iran ceasefire plan requiring immediate halt to critical infrastructure attacks
evidence_chain.relevance: Ceasefire proposal rejected or ignored, demonstrating diplomatic channel ineffectiveness

variable_proposals.current_assessment: Mojtaba Khamenei's health questioned; first written message issued to assert leadership; regime announces survival-focused strategies (Strait blockade, toll system); institutional consistency appears strained
variable_proposals.rationale: Mojtaba Khamenei issues first written message amid health questions, suggesting leadership vulnerability. Regime announces explicit survival-focused Strait blockade strategy rather than integrated strategic plan. Critical Threats Project indicates IRGC operates independently on blockade strategy. Pattern suggests regime leadership cohesion strain without institutional collapse.

evidence_chain.headline: Mojtaba Khamenei Issues First Written Message as Supreme Leader Amid Questions Over Health
evidence_chain.relevance: Health concerns trigger leadership assertion, indicating cohesion vulnerability at apex

evidence_chain.headline: Iran's IRGC announces Tehran will leverage Strait of Hormuz closure to ensure regime survival, signals permanent blockade strategy
evidence_chain.relevance: IRGC announces strategy independently with explicit 'regime survival' rationale, suggesting autonomous institutional action

evidence_chain.headline: Iran demands sovereignty recognition over Strait of Hormuz, proposes $800 million monthly toll system
evidence_chain.relevance: Unilateral toll demand without coordination signals shows institutional drift from unified strategy

no_change_assessment: Benjamin Netanyahu maintains current accountability/survival scores despite ICC arrest warrant context—evidence shows institutional constraint (Hungary visit conditional on ICC warrant status) rather than systematic dismantling. Narendra Modi's marginalization from Iran mediation does not meet narcissism threshold; Foreign Policy reporting is analytical rather than documenting sustained behavioral change. Vladimir Putin's dual mediator-supporter role evidences survival positioning but does not meet the 3-item threshold for dimension change across reliable source blocs.
